evalJudge.verdict: 93/100 PASS (ua-error-clarity, threshold 70; on par with baseline 93)

confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: Bare catch in the draft-creation loop swallowed systemic errors (NoDefaultAccountError / MissingInputEventError), which would mislabel a real fault as a benign 'partial' import.
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: ManualInputService now re-throws those two systemic errors and only counts genuine per-row creation failures. Regression test added (service.test.ts 'propagates a systemic creation error').

confirmedFindingsFixed.summary: A zero-draft parse redirected to /ledger?imported=0&failed=0 and rendered a success-styled '✓ Імпорт завершено / Створено операцій: 0' banner, implying success when nothing was recognized.
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Added isEmptyImport(); the summary now reads 'Не вдалося розпізнати жодної операції…' and the Ledger banner switches to a warning tone with a '⚠ Нічого не імпортовано' title. Message + helper tests added.

acceptedFindings.summary: firstParam helper is duplicated in app/imports/text/page.tsx (an identical one is exported from ledger-items/ui/ledger-params.ts).
acceptedFindings.rationale: Reviewer notes a cross-module import 'would arguably be worse'. Kept the 3-line helper local; promoting a shared foundation util is more churn than warranted for this slice.

acceptedFindings.summary: Polynomial regex in src/domain/parsing.ts:64 (phone redaction) on uncapped text could spend noticeable CPU on a multi-MB paste.
acceptedFindings.rationale: Single-user local app (BC-SCOPE-01) with no other tenant to starve; 'no input size limit' is a product decision and the parse path has a 30s adapter timeout. Pre-existing parsing code, not introduced by this slice. Optional future soft length cap noted.

acceptedFindings.summary: Default-account seeding (FR-ACCT-06/FR-ITEM-06 territory) is invoked inside the FR-TEXT channel action.
acceptedFindings.rationale: Documented intentional, idempotent reuse (proposal.md); ensures the default exists before item creation. Not silent drift.

acceptedFindings.summary: The Ledger summary 'failed' count reflects only per-draft creation failures; a parse failure redirects back to /imports/text instead.
acceptedFindings.rationale: Consistent with the spec delta wording and the FR-TEXT-05 scenario; not a contradiction.
